evals.prompt: Review the Primitive docs landing page for quality and adherence to this repo's documentation standards. The page under review is a snapshot at .claude/skills/docs-page-review-workspace/fixtures/index.md (it is the site's docs/index.md overview/landing page). Do not modify any repo files. Write your full review to the designated output directory as review.md.
evals.expected_output: Findings flagging web-only/browser-centric framing, mechanism-level detail on an overview page (defineModelSchema code, package-level stack detail), and the console-only-settings inconsistency aside.

evals.prompt: Review the docs page snapshot at .claude/skills/docs-page-review-workspace/fixtures/blob-buckets.md (it is docs/getting-started/blob-buckets.md, about Primitive blob buckets). Verify its factual claims — access policies, TTL tiers, TOML shapes, API parameters, limits — against the actual platform source in library_repos/js-bao-wss (and the installed primitive-admin CLI for CLI commands). Do not modify any repo files. Write your full review to the designated output directory as review.md.
evals.expected_output: Findings that the access-policy enum (public/authenticated/owner/cel) and TTL tiers (1-hour/1-day/30-days/persistent) don't match the real values (public-read/authenticated/owner-only; 1d/3d/14d/28d/180d/365d/permanent), that the TOML table is [bucket] not [blobBucket], that CEL bucket rules / blob.metadata aren't a released surface, that uploads take tags not metadata, and that the page ships a literal 'Content review needed' warning box.

evals.prompt: Review the docs page snapshot at .claude/skills/docs-page-review-workspace/fixtures/working-with-databases.md (it is docs/getting-started/working-with-databases.md, a getting-started page for developers new to Primitive). Is it at the right level of detail for its audience, and is it well structured? Do not modify any repo files. Write your full review to the designated output directory as review.md.
evals.expected_output: Findings that reference-depth material (conditional-filter boolean gates, optional-filter substitution tables, schema-gate error codes, operation timing) is too deep for a getting-started page and/or poorly ordered relative to introductory content; possibly flags the (SQLite-backed) infra mention.

evals.prompt: Review the docs page snapshot at .claude/skills/docs-page-review-workspace/fixtures/prompts.md (it is docs/getting-started/prompts.md, a getting-started concept page about managed prompts). Do not modify any repo files. Write your full review to the designated output directory as review.md.
evals.expected_output: A short review with no high-severity findings — this page conforms to the standards; the reviewer should say it's clean rather than padding findings.
